verses.4: who redeems your life from destruction,
verses.5: who satisfies your desire with good things,
verses.7: He made known his ways to Moses,
verses.8: The LORD is merciful and gracious,
verses.10: He has not dealt with us according to our sins,
verses.11: For as the heavens are high above the earth,
verses.12: As far as the east is from the west,
verses.13: Like a father has compassion on his children,
verses.14: For he knows how we are made.
verses.15: As for man, his days are like grass.
verses.16: For the wind passes over it, and it is gone.
verses.17: But the LORD’s loving kindness is from everlasting to everlasting with those who fear him,
verses.18: to those who keep his covenant,
verses.19: The LORD has established his throne in the heavens.
verses.20: Praise the LORD, you angels of his,
verses.21: Praise the LORD, all you armies of his,
verses.22: Praise the LORD, all you works of his,
